title: trifolium lupinaster subsp. pacificum
intro: Trifolium lupinaster subsp. pacificum is a subspecies of the lupin clover, a perennial legume native to the Pacific region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium lupinaster subsp. pacificum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Trifolium lupinaster subsp. pacificum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used as a food source for livestock and as a green manure crop.
